Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs. On Thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town, bringing the total to [25 + 4]. On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog, increasing the count to [25 + 4 + 1]. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, reducing the total to [25 + 4 + 1 - 3 - 3]. 

*** 

The current number of dogs in Emily's rescue center is [25 + 4 + 1 - 3 - 3]. The number of dogs has been updated based on the arrivals and adoptions. player
